item.title: What Happened to Savanah Soto and Matthew Guerra?
item.description: A true crime case analysis exploring the questions surrounding Savanah Soto and Matthew Guerra. This documentary-style breakdown looks at the known details and the broader story behind the case.

media:content.media:title: What Happened to Savanah Soto and Matthew Guerra?
media:content.media:description: A true crime case analysis exploring the questions surrounding Savanah Soto and Matthew Guerra. This documentary-style breakdown looks at the known details and the broader story behind the case.

item.title: She Never Arrived After Being Left at School
item.description: A true crime story centered on a troubling claim and the unanswered question of what happened next. This video looks at the timeline, the reported account, and the mystery surrounding her.

media:content.media:title: She Never Arrived After Being Left at School
media:content.media:description: A true crime story centered on a troubling claim and the unanswered question of what happened next. This video looks at the timeline, the reported account, and the mystery surrounding her.

item.title: A Relationship That Wouldn’t End
item.description: A true crime story centered around a relationship that continued to escalate despite attempts to move on. The video explores the timeline, personal dynamics, and events connected to the case. What warning signs do you think are often overlooked in situations like this?

media:content.media:title: A Relationship That Wouldn’t End
media:content.media:description: A true crime story centered around a relationship that continued to escalate despite attempts to move on. The video explores the timeline, personal dynamics, and events connected to the case. What warning signs do you think are often overlooked in situations like this?

item.title: Part 2: What Happened to Vanessa Guillen
item.description: The second part of a true crime discussion covering the case of Vanessa Guillén, focusing on the timeline, investigation developments, and public response. The video reviews reported details surrounding the case. What part of the investigation stands out most to you?

media:content.media:title: Part 2: What Happened to Vanessa Guillen
media:content.media:description: The second part of a true crime discussion covering the case of Vanessa Guillén, focusing on the timeline, investigation developments, and public response. The video reviews reported details surrounding the case. What part of the investigation stands out most to you?

item.title: Itzel Espinoza Case: Suspect Still at Large
item.description: A look at the final story of influencer Itzel Espinoza and the ongoing search for the suspect. This case-focused update reflects the available details and raises questions about what comes next.
